text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! The race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, how should I win this time? I know! I'll dash
forward during the last stretch and win with a
massive lead!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, duh! I gotta show off how super cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I mean, the crowd is here to see me, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I gotta give them what they want, or else they'll
leave disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You better be watching too, Trainer! Watch and
see how cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And everyone will be amazed by how I win!
